items.title: PostgreSQL 19 Beta 2 released, feature freeze in effect (GA fall 2026)
Percona Distribution for MySQL 8.0.46 / XtraDB Cluster 8.0.46-38 is the final 8.0-series release
MySQL 9.7.1 shipped as part of Oracle's June 2026 Critical Patch Update
MariaDB/Galera CVE-2026-49261 — CVSS 10.0 RCE via wsrep_notify_cmd, now patched in Percona XtraDB Cluster
PostgreSQL's May 2026 release fixed 11 CVEs including pg_createsubscriber SQL injection and MD5 timing-channel disclosure
AlloyDB adds ai.summarize/ai.agg_summarize/ai.analyze_sentiment and claims 6x faster vector search via ScaNN
Cloud SQL adds brute-force detection and Private Service Connect DNS automation
TiDB Cloud adds Top RU public preview and TTL job health metrics
MongoDB 8.2.12/8.0.28/7.0.39/8.3.7 patch 23+ CVEs, including two CVSS 9+ issues
CVE-2026-9740: pre-auth stack overflow DoS in BSONColumn validator (CVSS 8.7)
CVE-2026-4148: use-after-free in $lookup/$graphLookup on sharded clusters (CVSS 8.7)
CVE-2026-11933: use-after-free in server-side JS engine, fixed in 8.2.11/8.0.26/7.0.37/8.3.4 (CVSS 8.8)
MongoDB Ops Manager RCE via webhook FreeMarker templates (CVE-2026-8431, CVSS 9.4), fixed in 8.0.23
MongoDB Compass OIDC auth RCE (CVE-2026-14881, CVSS 8.4), fixed in 1.49.7
C Driver SASL canonicalization buffer overflow (CVE-2026-6691, CVSS 8.6), fixed in 2.1.3
MongoDB 8.0+ incompatible with Linux kernel 6.19 (TCMalloc crash on startup)
MongoDB Java Driver 5.9.0 released
Independent benchmark: MongoDB 8.2.5 SBE aggregation up to 28% faster than 6.0.3, optimizer still picks bad plans in 3 documented cases
Atlas Search & Vector Search reach public preview in Community Edition and Enterprise Server
MongoDB 8.2 changes geospatial index generation to prefer GeoJSON over legacy coordinates
Iceberg v4: relative paths and typed Content Stats ratified by community vote
Iceberg community pushing to deprecate equality deletes for v4
Apache Iceberg Rust 0.10.0 released, validated against pyiceberg-core
Iceberg Terraform Provider v0.1.0 voted through
Apache Polaris 1.6.0 shipped, continuing monthly release cadence
Parquet approves new File logical type; 1.18.0 release process starting
Apache Arrow 25.0.0 released
Debezium 3.6 reaches GA with Spanner UUID, Vitess truncation, YashanDB connector
CVE-2026-54917: SeaweedFS Iceberg REST catalog gateway path traversal (High, fixed in 4.30)
July 2026 CPU is Oracle's largest ever: 1,449 patches / 1,434 CVEs across 334 products
CVE-2026-61211: CVSS 9.9 DBMS_CLOUD privilege-escalation flaw in RDBMS, fixed in 23.26.3/19.32
CVE-2026-47040: CVSS 9.1 remote, unauthenticated RDBMS vulnerability, fixed in July 2026 RU
ADB Serverless July updates: APEX 26.1, Select AI agents over A2A protocol, AD selection
ADB Serverless June: DBMS_DCAT adds Iceberg REST catalog support (Unity Catalog, Polaris)
ADB Serverless: Deep Data Security brings in-DB row/column-level access control
ADB Dedicated June: X11MV support, AVMC/ACD manageability controls, AWS KMS CMK for cross-region Data Guard
Exadata System Software July 2026: 25.2.12 recommended, 25.1 line reaches final update
Exadata CellSQLStat utility gives real-time Smart Scan flash/XRMEM visibility
Oracle Ask TOM: logical I/Os, not elapsed time, is the metric to tune SQL against
New [NO]WAIT clause added to INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE in Oracle AI Database
Snowflake Gen2 standard warehouses are GA and Adaptive Compute is rolling out
Cortex Code rebranded to "CoCo" with expanded model choice (Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.2) and new Cortex Sense memory layer
AI_TRANSCRIBE adds AAC support; Integrated SaaS listings on Marketplace reach GA
Apache Polaris (Snowflake's Iceberg catalog) is now fully open source under Apache 2.0
Pass-through policy support for dynamic tables with incremental refresh reaches GA
VOLATILE scalar UDFs now supported in incremental/auto/adaptive dynamic-table refresh
CVE-2026-16870: CVSS 8.8 buffer overflow in libsnowflakeclient, fixed in 2.9.2
Legacy Worksheets and Dashboards begin phased removal from Snowsight (started 2026-06-22)
Single-factor password authentication deprecation phased rollout May-October 2026
Snowpipe Streaming classic architecture headed for formal deprecation notice, 18-month sunset once announced
dbt Projects on Snowflake add SQL environment variable and private Git package support
Workload identity federation for external services reaches GA
Databricks Runtime 19 GA (Spark 4.2.0) — JDK 17 dropped, ~90 Python packages removed
Databricks Runtime 18 transitions to 3-year LTS
Multi-statement transactions GA for Unity Catalog managed Delta tables
Variant semi-structured data type reaches GA
Managed Iceberg materialized views hit Public Preview
Secrets become Unity Catalog securable objects (preview); Scala/Java UDFs in UC reach GA
Lakebase achieves SOC 2 Type 2; Lakebase Search beta adds hybrid vector/full-text in Postgres
Genie Spaces renamed Genie Agents; hybrid search default in Vector Search; Genie billing correction issued
Anthropic connector in Lakeflow Connect (Beta) ingests Claude Compliance API data
Context-based ingress control GA, role-based access control preview, Governance Hub beta
Azure Standard-tier workspaces auto-upgrade to Premium by October 1, 2026
Gemini 2.5 Flash (Oct 2) and Claude Sonnet 4 (Oct 9) Foundation Model API retirements scheduled
Declarative Asset Bundles default to direct deployment engine over Terraform engine
Apache Iceberg managed tables reach GA: partitioning, multi-statement transactions, advanced runtime
Cross-cloud Lakehouse adds SAP Business Data Cloud integration (Preview)
Hybrid VECTOR_SEARCH (semantic+keyword) shipped then disabled again within two weeks
Autonomous embedding generation reaches GA
Data Agent Kit VS Code/Cursor extension and BigQuery Migration Service MCP server ship
Project caps (scheduling policies) preview limits per-project slots/concurrency in shared reservations
Data governance tags add column-level security and masking (Preview)
Missing Authorization vulnerability fixed across BigQuery, Dataform, Colab Enterprise repositories
CVE-2026-23529 (CVSS 7.7 High): SSRF/arbitrary file read in Aiven BigQuery Sink Connector for Kafka, fixed in 2.11.0
IAM deny policies for BigQuery reach GA
Google-developed JDBC driver for BigQuery reaches GA
Pre-trained TimesFM models GA in BigQuery ML via Connected Sheets for forecasting/anomaly detection
Patch 202 takes Spectrum COPY and zero-ETL concurrency scaling to GA
Patch 203 adds account lockout, SHOW GRANTS FOR GROUP, and up to 30% faster ANALYZE
Python UDFs stopped executing after June 30, 2026 — migrate to Lambda UDFs
RG (Graviton) instances add rg.large/rg.12xlarge sizes, GovCloud support, and RI upfront pricing
Serverless AI-driven scaling's minimum RPU floor drops from 32 to 8
Manual snapshot billing now meters unique data blocks instead of per-snapshot size
CVE-2026-8178: Redshift JDBC driver arbitrary class loading, fixed in 2.2.2
CVE-2026-8838: amazon-redshift-python-driver code injection, fixed in 2.1.14
Fabric Data Warehouse gets GPU query acceleration (CoddSpeed), early access preview opens July 2026
Mirrored Database Change Feed to Eventstream connector reaches preview
CDC with SQL Estates in Copy Job reaches GA
Eventstream Kafka and Azure Service Bus connectors reach GA
Private Link extended to more mirroring sources (Azure SQL, SAP, SQL Server, SharePoint)
CI/CD support for SQL Analytics Endpoint reaches preview (DacFx + Git)
Item Recovery reaches GA with up to 90-day retention
sys.sp_get_table_health_metrics T-SQL stored proc reaches GA
Business Events now billed against standard Fabric capacity (GA)
Default AI Functions model updated to gpt-5-mini, gpt-5.1 support added (GA)
New Pipeline node canvas UI expected to roll out by end of July 2026
ClickHouse 26.6/26.7 ship hypothetical skip indexes, AI embedding functions, experimental continuous queries
ClickHouse-authored pg_re2 Postgres extension gives 1.8-8.6x regex speedup
ClickBench 2026: ClickHouse wins most queries but DuckDB leads on heavy aggregations
StarRocks 4.0 hits GA with vector search and deeper Iceberg integration
StarRocks 3.5 makes malformed JSON fail queries instead of returning NULL
CelerData rebrands to PhoenixAI, repositions StarRocks for AI agents
Apache Doris 4.1.3/4.0.7 ship with full Iceberg V3 SQL support
Trino release 483 ships July 17-18
Starburst Galaxy adds AIDA assistant, changes query result-set limits
Imply/Druid 2026.07 STS drops Java 17 support, requires Java 25
StarRocks 4.1.0 has a container-startup bug, fixed in 4.1.1
SAP's acquisition of Dremio on track to close Q3 2026
Firebolt v4.32 adds CREATE ICEBERG DATABASE for Glue/Snowflake Open Catalog/Databricks
DuckLake v1.0 production-ready; MotherDuck ships agent-native Flights pipelines
AMD launches EPYC 9006 "Venice" (Zen 6) with 16-channel DDR5/MRDIMM, up to 256 cores
AWS Graviton5 reaches GA with 192 cores, DDR5-8800, and real MySQL/ClickHouse perf gains
DRAM/NAND shortage keeps worsening: Gartner sees 130% price surge, DDR5 server RDIMMs could double by year-end
Enterprise SSD/NAND contract prices up 70-95% QoQ; SanDisk reportedly doubling enterprise NAND pricing
Micron retires consumer Crucial brand to prioritize enterprise/AI DRAM customers
Enterprise PCIe 6.0 SSDs (Micron 9650, Samsung PM1763) now shipping in volume
Three new audited TPC-H results published: Dell/Exasol, HPE/SQL Server 2025, Alibaba Hologres
RAPIDS 26.06 ships with continued cuDF GPU-acceleration gains for ETL ahead of DB loads
AsyncAPI npm packages compromised with import-time backdoor and active C2, still unpatched
Jscrambler npm packages compromised with credential-stealing native binaries, fixed in 8.22.0+
Malicious commit found in @injectivelabs/sdk-ts, widely-used Injective TypeScript SDK
npm v12 ships GA, turns off install scripts, git deps, and remote deps by default
Node.js schedules July 27 security release fixing HIGH-severity issues across 22.x/24.x/26.x
.NET 10.0.10 ships as a security patch release
Rust 1.97.1 fixes an LLVM miscompilation bug from 1.97.0
Node.js 26.5.0 ships with the Temporal API stable, no flag needed
Deno 2.7 adds Temporal API, Windows ARM support, and npm overrides
OpenTelemetry ships v1 of Go compile-time instrumentation (Alibaba + Datadog)
Apache Kafka 4.3.1 fixes a Kafka Streams RocksDB native memory leak
Valkey 7.2.14 ships as a routine maintenance release
Langflow unauthenticated RCE via public-flow build endpoint (CVE-2026-33017, CVSS 9.3)
MCP's 2026-07-28 spec finalizes stateless protocol, drops session handshake, deprecates Roots/Sampling/Logging
MCP's same spec revision overhauls auth: OAuth 2.1, RFC 9728 protected-resource metadata, CIMD registration
LangChain path traversal / sandbox escape in file-search middleware (CVE-2026-55443)
LangSmith SDK TracingMiddleware arbitrary file read (CVE-2026-59152)
LangGraph SDK and checkpoint CVEs: unsafe URL construction and unsafe JSON deserialization (CVE-2026-48776/48775)
Anthropic's agent-memory-2026-07-22 header changes memory-list ordering and invalidates old pagination cursors
Claude Sonnet 5 API migration: adaptive thinking default-on, manual thinking removed, sampling params now error, ~30% larger tokenizer
Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.7 removed today (July 24, 2026); requests now error
Anthropic's legacy Workbench and experimental prompt-tools APIs retire August 17, 2026
OpenAI expands strict JSON-schema structured outputs across Responses, Chat, Assistants, Fine-tuning, and Batch APIs
Gemini API structured outputs get fuller JSON Schema support (anyOf, $ref) and preserve key order
Pydantic AI reaches stable v2.0 and iterates rapidly through v2.17 (durable execution, tool-retry budgets)
Next.js July 2026 security release fixes 8 CVEs (4 High, 4 Medium) across App Router, Server Actions, and Turbopack middleware
jscrambler npm package compromised — credential-stealing native binaries shipped in 8.14.0–8.20.0, also poisoned webpack/gulp/grunt/metro plugins
AsyncAPI npm org compromised via leaked GitHub Actions token — malicious code executes at import time, bypassing --ignore-scripts and valid Sigstore/SLSA attestations
npm v12 ships (July 8) blocking install scripts by default after a year of supply-chain attacks — breaking change for postinstall-dependent tooling
Vue 3.6 enters RC with Vapor Mode feature-complete — compiled, no-virtual-DOM rendering on an alien-signals reactivity rewrite
Vite 8.1 ships experimental Bundled Dev Mode (up to ~15x faster cold start reported) and Chunk Import Maps
Astro 7.1 adds deferRender content-loader option and experimental chunked collection storage to cut build memory
Playwright 1.61 adds a WebAuthn/passkey virtual authenticator and a Web Storage API for tests
Zod v4.4 tightens validation semantics (tuple defaults, merge, base64/URL checks) — breaking for some existing schemas
GitHub Actions enforces minimum self-hosted runner versions starting July 31, 2026
actions/checkout v7 ships safer pull_request_target defaults
Copilot CLI can now run in GitHub Actions without a PAT
Argo CD 3.5 (RC) adds native Helm 4 migration support and a Gateway API network view
Kubernetes 1.33 reached end of life on June 28, 2026
OpenTofu patched a high-severity arbitrary file read (GHSA-q7j3-v8qv-22vq, CVSS 7.5)
OpenTofu fixed a TLS Encrypted Client Hello leak that de-anonymizes server hostnames
Docker Buildx v0.35.0 adds CPU/memory resource limits and delete mode for local output
OpenTelemetry Collector v0.157/v1.63 changes histogram bucket boundaries for batch metrics
Cilium 1.20.0-rc.1 deprecates Beta Mutual Auth and promotes Multi-Cluster Services API to stable
Google Play target-SDK deadline: apps must target Android 16 (API 36) by August 31, 2026, extension to Nov 1 available
Apple's privacy-manifest and third-party-SDK signature requirements remain a mandatory App Store submission gate
Xcode 26.6 ships stable with Swift 6.3, iOS/iPadOS/tvOS/watchOS/visionOS 26.5 SDKs, and Gemini as a coding-agent option
Android Studio Quail 2 reaches stable (July 14), Quail 3/4 already in RC/canary
AGP 9.3.0 adds standalone R8 config analyzer task, simplified optimization DSL, and per-source-set keep-rule files
Kotlin 2.4.0 (July 22) removes the K1 compiler, stabilizes context parameters/UUID API, adds Swift-package import for KMP
Android Security Bulletin — July 2026 contains zero CVEs
Flutter 3.44.0 stable bundles Dart 3.10, adds iOS wide-gamut color support and Android predictive-back for Fragments
Expo SDK 57 bundles React Native 0.86 with no intended breaking changes from 0.85, signaling a faster non-breaking release cadence
EAS ships passkey sign-in and a Maestro E2E testing insights dashboard; EAS Observe reaches GA August 20
Claude Code v2.1.218 moves /code-review to a background subagent
Claude Code v2.1.217 fixes MCP tool-output memory leak and Windows auto-update failures
Cursor ships Router: automatic model selection by cost/intelligence
OpenAI Codex 0.145.0 stabilizes multi-agent V2, imports Cursor/Claude Code settings
OpenAI brings voice-controlled computer use and multi-agent coordination to ChatGPT Work/Codex via GPT-Live
OpenAI launches Presence, an enterprise voice/chat AI agent deployment product
Gemini 3.6 Flash added as a model option in GitHub Copilot
Google releases Gemini 3.6 Flash, drops temperature/top_p/top_k sampling params for this generation
GitHub MCP Server adopts MCP's next (stateless) spec ahead of ~July 28 rollout
Malvertising campaign spoofs Claude desktop app via Bing ads and Claude Artifacts to deliver SectopRAT malware, 29+ orgs hit
DeepSeek deprecates deepseek-chat/deepseek-reasoner names in favor of v4-flash/v4-pro
Database Context Compression (DBCC) shrinks Spider 2.0-Snow schema context from 2.6M to 34.7K tokens with accuracy gains
Corpus-adaptive embedding fine-tuning lets a 305M retriever match 4-8B embedders on schema retrieval benchmark
GRID: grammar-railed (LALR(1)) constrained decoding hits 94.5% executable accuracy on 7B models with role-based access at the mask level
Policy-Conditioned Constrained Decoding (PCC-SQL) enforces column-level access control during SQL generation with zero leakage
Selective-prediction study finds LLM-judge verification ensembles reach 0.82 AUROC for knowing when a generated SQL query is wrong
"Knowing When to Stop" predicts execution-consistency convergence to cut redundant LLM calls in agentic Text-to-SQL loops
Cross-family BIRD study: self-correction is a near-free accuracy win for on-prem open LLMs, schema linking shows no measurable benefit
SQuaD-SQL distills Text-to-SQL into small language models for consumer-GPU deployment, 86.9% EX on WikiSQL
Spider 2.0-AIFunc benchmark tests Text-to-SQL over AI-native SQL functions (classification, sentiment, similarity search); SOTA models struggle
SAGE framework automatically discovers structural, cross-model-transferable vulnerabilities in Text-to-SQL systems
AMD launches Helios rack-scale AI platform with MI455X, MI430X, MI350P at Advancing AI 2026
Nvidia unveils Vera Rubin NVL72 platform, production ramping at CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Azure, OCI
Nvidia Spectrum-6 Ethernet switch arrives for gigascale AI factory networking
Samsung HBM4 validated and shipping to Nvidia, diversifying supply beyond SK Hynix
Two-phase refrigerant cooling (Accelsius) targets 600kW/rack AI accelerator density by 2027
AMD and Cerebras partner on disaggregated GPU+SRAM inference platform to counter Nvidia's Groq LPUs
AMD Helios vs Nvidia Vera Rubin: independent spec-for-spec comparison shows mixed, workload-dependent results
